prd.user_story: As a new pandas team engineer, I need to audit which pandas source files directly import scipy.stats functions at runtime, to document scipy integration points.
constraints: Only include files with a 'from scipy.stats import' statement (not docstring mentions).
Include both production and test files in pandas-dev/pandas.
prd.success_definition: Agent finds all 4 Python files in pandas-dev/pandas that contain 'from scipy.stats import': pandas/core/nanops.py, pandas/plotting/_matplotlib/misc.py, pandas/plotting/_matplotlib/hist.py, and pandas/tests/groupby/test_reductions.py.
prd.seed_prompt: Which Python files in pandas-dev/pandas contain a 'from scipy.stats import' statement?
